content.sanskrit: ब्रह्मवादिनो वदन्ति । किं कारणं ब्रह्म कुतः स्म जाता जीवाम केन क्व च सम्प्रतिष्ठाः ।
content.transliteration: brahmavādino vadanti | kiṁ kāraṇaṁ brahma kutaḥ sma jātā jīvāma kena kva ca sampratiṣṭhāḥ |
content.text: Those who discourse on Brahman say: What is the cause? Is it Brahman? Whence are we born? By what do we live? And on what are we established?
